// reporters: StaticNestedInstanceDodge.java.txt#Outer.reportInstance
package com.consumer.staticnest;

// Regression: implicit-this from inside a STATIC nested type cannot reach an
// INSTANCE method of the enclosing type (no enclosing-instance reference
// exists there) - the bare call must swallow, not capture.
class Outer {
    void reportInstance(Throwable cause) {}

    static class Nested {
        void m() {
            try {
                risky();
            } catch (Exception e) { // want "JV001"
                reportInstance(e);
            }
        }

        void risky() throws Exception {}
    }
}
